keyFeatures.en: AI-driven productivity tools for email and calendar management
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的生产力工具，用于邮件和日历管理
自动化任务创建和优先级排序

description.en: Basic features such as email filtering and task creation
description.zh: 基础功能，如邮件过滤和任务创建

description.en: Advanced features such as AI-driven task prioritization, calendar integration, and unlimited email filtering
description.zh: 高级功能，如AI驱动的任务优先级排序、日历集成和无限邮件过滤

weaknesses.en: No explicit mention of customer support

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses looking to enhance their productivity
targetAudience.zh: 寻求提高生产力的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Superhumanizer positions itself as a premium productivity tool for busy professionals and small businesses
positioning.zh: Superhumanizer 定位为面向忙碌的专业人士和小型企业的高端生产力工具
